TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241548. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 2 side a of tape: A mixture of songs to tribal tunes. The song titles are: 1) My Lover; 2) A Happy Wedding; 3) To Get Along With Lover; 4) People Celebrating; 5) Hunting Hero. Recorded in June 1966.
